texto: But now ask the beasts, and let them teach you; And the birds of the heavens, and let them tell you. Or speak to the Earth, and let it teach you; And the fish of the sea declare to you. Who among all these does not know that the hand of the Lord has done this,In whose hand is the life of every living thing,And the breath of all mankind?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Job 12:7-10 que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “But now ask the beasts, and let them teach you; And the birds of the heavens, and let them tell y…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, bible, job, com foco em job.
